UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user preferences and their FCM tokens for push notification alert delivery.

userId.description: The unique user ID matching Firebase Auth.

fcmToken.description: The current registered Firebase Cloud Messaging token.

notificationsEnabled.description: Whether the user accepted notification permissions.

ChildProfile.title: Child Profile
ChildProfile.description: A child profile representing a family member for pediatric tracking.

/users/{userId}.description: User profile with push notification preferences.

/users/{userId}/profiles/{profileId}.description: Child profiles belonging to the authenticated parent.
